CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Distressed_Account', IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Charged_Off_Date__c)), IF(TODAY() - Charged_Off_Date__c > 2192, True, False), False), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Date__c)), IF( TODAY() - Last_Payment_Date__c > 2192, True, False), IF( TODAY() - Disbursement_Date__c > 2192, True, False) ))
CustomField.label: Difference Greater Than N Years
